message:
Merge PR #2959: fix: scan dolt_rebase.rebase_order as string to handle DECIMAL type

Dolt returns rebase_order as DECIMAL which the MySQL driver delivers as
[]uint8 (e.g. "1.00"), not directly scannable to int. Parse as string
then convert to avoid scan errors during compaction and manual rebase.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2959
Author: dannomayernotabot
